notes: Hey Scrap by itself now acknowledges the player and then opens a fresh 15-second command-listening window.
Inline phrases such as Hey Scrap show my fleet still use the fast single-capture path.
Post-answer replies reopen a 15-second no-wake conversation window after Scrap finishes speaking.
Voice-operation deadlines now cover microphone capture plus hosted transcription, preventing late transcripts from being discarded.
Private fleet, inventory history, Verse Knowledge, settings, login, and memories are unchanged and preserved.
